about.name: FlyingFish Scuba School
about.certifications: SSI and PADI globally certified instructors
about.diveSite: Grande Island, 30 minutes by boat from Candolim
about.minAge: 10 years (parental consent under 18, no upper age limit)
about.founder: Amitabh Gautam (former TV news pioneer, 25+ years in media, SSI Advanced Adventurer)
about.googleMaps: FlyingFish Scuba School, Novotel Resort and Spa, Candolim, Goa

partnerships: Novotel Resort & Spa, Goa — Hospitality Partner
whatMakesDifferent: 40-minute dives: 3x industry average (most Goa operators offer 10-15 min)
HD photos & videos FREE in ALL packages
SSI certified instructors with 3,000+ combined dives
No swimming required for beginner packages

team.name: Aaron Fernandes
team.details: Diving since 2007, 4,000+ Discover Scuba experiences, 150+ certifications

team.name: Sunil
team.details: The quiet force that keeps everything flowing

team.name: Amitabh Gautam
team.details: SSI Advanced Adventurer, 200+ logged dives worldwide

beginnerPackages.note: All packages include: 1:1 SSI-certified instructor, pool training at Novotel Resort & Spa, boat to Grande Island, HD photos and videos FREE, full equipment, snacks, 10 Lakh insurance.
beginnerPackages.namingRules: Always say 'Scuba 20', 'Scuba 40', 'Scuba 40+40' — not 'twenty-minute package' or 'double dive'.

packages.name: Scuba 20
packages.description: A 20-minute dive into the sea. Pool training at Novotel, then a real shipwreck dive. HD photos & videos included.

packages.name: Scuba 40
packages.description: Most popular package. 40-minute dive, pool training, shipwreck adventure, participation certificate, and referral cashback.
packages.bestFor: The proper dive experience most people want. MOST POPULAR.

packages.name: Scuba 40+40
packages.description: Two dives — a shipwreck AND a coral garden. Includes buffet dinner at Novotel, A/C pickup & drop, social reel, and a free FlyingFish T-shirt.

funDives.note: For certified divers only (SSI, PADI, NAUI, BSAC, CMAS). Location: 5 dive sites around Grande Island.
funDives.includes: Guided dives, full ScubaPro equipment, boat, dive guide, snacks & fruits (Novotel hospitality), HD photos & videos, insurance.
funDives.details: Max 4 divers per Divemaster. Free refresher if not dived in 12+ months. Nitrox (EANx32/36) available. Arrive at Novotel by 7:30 AM. Complimentary refresher — arrive by 6:30 AM.

diveSites.name: Grande Island Reef
diveSites.highlights: Healthy coral gardens, moray eels, barracuda, snappers

diveSites.name: Suzy's Wreck
diveSites.highlights: British-era vessel at ~40ft, soft corals, groupers, stingrays, moray eels

diveSites.name: Sail Rock
diveSites.highlights: Rocky pinnacle with strong currents, eagle rays, drift diving

marineLife: 100+ species — angelfish, parrotfish, snappers, groupers, eagle rays, blue-spotted stingrays, moray eels, hawksbill and olive ridley sea turtles, nudibranchs, crinoids, pipefish

schedule.note: All food and beverages provided by Novotel. Timings may vary ±15 minutes.
timeline: 06:00 AM — Arrival at Novotel Resort. Park inside, fill forms, meet instructor.
06:15 AM — Safety & Dive Briefing. Dive plan, equipment, safety signals.
06:30 AM — Pool Training (1 hour). Breathing, buoyancy, underwater communication.
08:00 AM — Boat ride to Grande Island (~30 min)
08:30 AM — Arrive at dive site, gear up
09:00 AM — Dive! (20 or 40 minutes depending on package)
After dive — Surface interval, snacks, second dive if Scuba 40+40

faqs.swimming: No swimming required for beginners — 1:1 instructor throughout. Yes for certification courses (200m swim, 10-min float).
faqs.ageLimit: Minimum 10 years, parental consent under 18. No upper age limit.
faqs.weightLimit: Some practical limits due to gear sizes — declare weight when booking.
faqs.glasses: Prescription masks available — mention when booking.
faqs.scaredOfWater: Normal! Pool training first, instructor beside you, signal to surface anytime.
faqs.medicalForm: Required for all. Doctor's clearance if on daily medication.
faqs.asthma: May be possible with mild, well-controlled asthma + doctor's clearance.
faqs.pregnant: Cannot dive. Welcome on the boat trip for snorkeling.
faqs.period: Yes, you can dive. Use tampon or menstrual cup.
faqs.flyingAfterDiving: No flying for 18-24 hours after last dive.
faqs.ssiVsPadi: Both are equally recognized worldwide. SSI is more affordable — that's why most divers choose it here.
faqs.isSafe: 1:1 instructor, SSI certified, 10 Lakh insurance, 3,000+ happy divers.
faqs.tooExpensive: Scuba 40 includes everything — 40-min dive, photos, videos, equipment. Most operators charge extra for photos alone!
faqs.cantSwim: No swimming needed! Your instructor stays right beside you the entire time.
faqs.photos: HD photos and videos FREE in ALL packages. Shared via download link after the dive.
faqs.ownCamera: GoPro/action camera may be allowed — check in advance.
faqs.whatToBring: Swimwear, towel, change of clothes, sunscreen, sunglasses, valid government photo ID (mandatory). All diving equipment is provided.
faqs.whatToEat: Light, easy-to-digest meal 1-2 hours before. Avoid heavy/greasy/spicy food. Stay hydrated. No alcohol night before or day of dive.
faqs.nonDivingCompanion: Can join the boat and snorkel. Ask about charges.

booking.advance: ₹500 non-refundable per person via UPI/bank transfer. Balance on dive day.
booking.paymentMethods: UPI (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm), bank transfer, cash, cards.
booking.cancellation: 7+ days = full refund minus ₹500. 3-7 days = 50% refund. Less than 3 days = no refund. Weather cancellation = full refund.
booking.groupDiscount: Yes — contact on WhatsApp for custom quote.
booking.equipment: All included — ScubaPro BCD, regulator, wetsuit, mask, fins, dive computer.

combos.note: FlyingFish offers bundle packages combining certifications.
combos.contact: Contact WhatsApp for latest combo pricing and availability.

internationalTrips.note: FlyingFish organizes international liveaboard dive trips from India.
internationalTrips.contact: Contact for upcoming trip dates, pricing, and group discounts.
